episodes.title: The EVIL Animator who started a CULT
episodes.description:
Jordan D's Spirit Science cult has haunted the internet for over a decade with poorly thought out religious Game Theories and borderline insane conspiracies. Today we look at the man behind the insanity, and try to understand what drives a man to such braindead places. 

The iconic Twitter: https://x.com/NodeArmstrong

00:00 Intro
02:00 Early Career
09:43 Spiritual Awakening 
14:00 Spirit Science
28:04 Abuse Allegations
34:00 Emma Watson
42:25 Elixr the Animated Series
47:27 Q-anon and Charlie Kirk
59:23 AI and Elixr
1:04:08 The Future
